detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Layer 3 Switching
detailed_description.text:
The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro HD 24 (USW-Pro-HD-24) is a professional-grade Layer 3 switch engineered to deliver exceptional performance and versatility for modern network infrastructures. It features two 10 Gigabit Ethernet (GbE) ports, twenty-two 2.5 GbE ports, and four 10G SFP+ ports, providing a total non-blocking throughput of 115 Gbps and a switching capacity of 230 Gbps. This robust configuration ensures seamless data transmission and efficient handling of high-bandwidth applications, making it ideal for enterprise environments that demand high-speed connectivity and reliability.

Equipped with advanced Layer 3 switching capabilities, the USW-Pro-HD-24 supports features such as static routing, VLAN routing, and DHCP services, enabling efficient traffic management and network segmentation. These features enhance network performance, security, and scalability, making the switch suitable for complex network architectures. Additionally, the switch supports Etherlighting™, a feature that illuminates ports to indicate port location, speed/link, and native VLAN/network, facilitating easy identification and troubleshooting.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Features
detailed_description.text:
In addition to its Layer 3 capabilities, the USW-Pro-HD-24 offers a range of Layer 2 features, including IGMP snooping, port isolation, multicast/broadcast rate limiting, flow control, and 802.1X control. These features help optimize network traffic and protect against potential security risks. Additionally, the USW-Pro-HD-24 integrates seamlessly with the UniFi Network application (Version 8.6.9 and later), offering a user-friendly interface to manage, monitor, and configure your network. The application simplifies deployment and ongoing management, enabling real-time monitoring and quick adjustments to maintain network performance and security.

The USW-Pro-HD-24 has an SGCC steel enclosure measuring 442.4 x 285 x 44 mm and weighing 4.2 kg without mounting brackets, making it suitable for both rack-mounted and standalone deployments. The switch includes rackmount brackets for easy integration into standard 19-inch racks, while its compact design allows for placement in various environments, including data centers, server rooms, and office spaces. The 1.3" touchscreen LCD provides real-time system status updates, enhancing user experience and simplifying network management.
